results.prompt: A sun-drenched, minimalist marble kitchen counter at 7:00 AM featuring a matte white AG1 pouch and a clear glass of vibrant green liquid. Typography: Headline 'THE FIRST 60 SECONDS FOR ALL-DAY ENERGY' in ultra-bold, condensed Inter Tight, centered and oversized. Subhead 'Stop the caffeine crash. 97% of users report higher energy levels after 30 days.' in Optima style below. Added 5-star rating graphic in the top corner. Color palette: Cream, AG1 green, and charcoal. Layout is editorial yet conversion-focused.

High-angle top-down shot of an oak nightstand with a matte white AG1 pouch, green liquid, and a designer watch. Typography: 'REPLACE 9 SUPPLEMENTS. START HERE.' in extra-large Caslon Graphique bleeding off the right edge in AG1 green. Secondary line '75 ingredients. 1 scoop. Total gut health.' in technical Pitch Sans at bottom left. A small badge reads '90-DAY MONEY BACK GUARANTEE' in a clean circular seal. Lighting is crisp and premium.

Lifestyle shot of an athletic woman in a neutral-toned kitchen, drinking from a clear glass of AG1. The matte white pouch is blurred in the foreground. Typography: 'THE DAILY RITUAL THAT ENDS BLOAT' in heavy Akzidenz-Grotesk all-caps layered behind her head. Subcopy 'One scoop for 75 vitamins, minerals, and whole-food sourced nutrients' set vertically in hairline sans-serif. Vibe is aspirational and athletic with a clear 'Try Risk-Free' CTA button-style element in the bottom right.

Close-up of a hand pouring cold water into a glass with AG1 green powder; matte white pouch nearby. Moody blue-hour lighting. Typography: 'BEFORE COFFEE. BETTER THAN COFFEE.' in massive, ultra-heavy display stencil font at 20% opacity. Subhead 'Foundational Nutrition: No jitters, just sustained focus.' in bold italicized humanist sans. Layout feels like a premium fashion spread but leads with a high-contrast 'Us vs. Them' value proposition.

Minimalist shot of an open matte white AG1 pouch with the metal scoop resting on top against a plaster wall. Sharp, architectural shadows. Typography: 'STOP GUESSING. ELIMINATE NUTRITIONAL GAPS.' in stacked, justified Helvetica Now in AG1 green. Subhead 'Your all-in-one nutritional insurance policy. NSF Certified for Sport.' in elegant italic serif at the bottom. Palette is strictly AG1 green and off-white. High-contrast, thumb-stopping hierarchy.

Macro photograph of vibrant green AG1 powder texture emphasizing botanical complexity. Clinical side-lighting. Typography: '75 INGREDIENTS. 0 SYNTHETIC FILLERS.' in ultra-wide, technical monospaced font across the top. Matte white pouch at bottom edge. Specific call-outs like 'Spirulina for Immunity' and 'Ashwagandha for Stress' scatter across the image with thin leader lines. A small 'Trustpilot' logo with 5 stars is positioned in the lower margin for social proof.

Macro focus on the back of the matte white AG1 pouch, highlighting the ingredient list with shallow depth of field. Typography: 'THE LABEL IS THE PRODUCT' in oversized, outlined knockout-style extended grotesque. Subhead 'No synthetic fillers. No GMOs. Just clean science.' in high-contrast bold serif at 90-degrees. A bright AG1 green sticker-style element reads 'SUBSCRIBE & SAVE 20%' to drive immediate direct response action.

A clear glass flask of AG1 liquid next to raw reishi mushrooms and ginger root. Moody, sophisticated dark-green-to-black gradient background. Typography: 'RESEARCH-BACKED. CLEAN SCIENCE.' in high-contrast Founders Grotesk all-caps, centered. Small elegant captions describe the clinical benefits of each botanical. Bottom center features a 'Trusted by 1,000+ Pro Athletes' callout in a light, clean sans-serif font. Aesthetic is high-end apothecary.

Shot of the matte white AG1 pouch being opened with a small puff of green powder. Clean, neutral gray studio background. Typography: 'THE ELITE STANDARD. TRUST THE PROCESS.' in bold Futura using a mix of filled and outlined letters. Layout is asymmetric: 'THE ELITE' stacked left, 'STANDARD' right. Subhead 'NSF Certified for Sport. Used by Olympians. Perfected for you.' in a bold mono font at bottom center. Look is professional and trustworthy.

Studio shot of AG1 matte white pouch surrounded by artfully arranged fresh greens and fruits (Kith lookbook style). Saturated, punchy colors. Typography: 'FOOD-SOURCED. BETTER ABSORPTION.' in heavy, lowercase-only Union grotesque with negative tracking. Subcopy 'Ditch the synthetic pill cabinet for bioavailable whole foods.' in a small sans-serif box at bottom left with AG1 green fill and white text. Layout is high-impact and maximizes screen real estate.

Split composition: Left side is a chaotic pile of 15 plastic vitamin bottles with harsh lighting; Right side is one matte white AG1 pouch and a glass of green liquid with soft, premium lighting. Typography: 'DITCH THE CABINET. $3.23 PER DAY.' in massive ultra-black display font centered over the split. Subhead 'The math is simple. Replace your entire routine with one scoop.' in light-weight wide-tracked serif. Bold, data-driven, and high-contrast 'Before/After' framing.

Visualizing value: a single AG1 scoop centered with small price tags ($0.40, $0.50) floating around it representing different nutrient categories. Cream-colored studio background. Typography: 'THE ULTIMATE UPGRADE' in medium-weight modern serif with extreme letter-spacing vertically along margins. A large '$3.23' is centered in bold, outlined sans-serif. Bottom CTA: 'START YOUR 90-DAY RISK-FREE TRIAL' in a clean, high-contrast bar. Focal point is the unbeatable value-per-serving.

A flat lay of the AG1 matte white pouch and travel packs next to a premium leather wallet and high-end earbuds. The scene is lit with warm, expensive light. Typography: '$100 VALUE. $3 DAILY.' in a high-fashion, condensed sans-serif (similar to SSENSE branding) that spans the top third of the frame. The font weight is ultra-heavy. Subhead 'Consolidate your routine' is written in a tiny, elegant humanist font tucked into the negative space of the '3'. The palette is black, white, and AG1 green.

An image of a medicine cabinet overflowing with supplements, partially obscured by a large, minimalist typographic overlay. Typography: 'DITCH THE CABINET' in a bold, aggressive stencil font in AG1 green. Behind the text, the matte white AG1 pouch stands in clear focus while the cabinet is blurred. Subhead 'Everything you need, in one scoop' in a clean, all-caps sans-serif at the bottom. The composition is dynamic and cluttered-to-clean, showing the solution effectively.

results.hook: BETTER FOR YOUR BIOLOGY. BETTER FOR YOUR BANK.
results.prompt: A sleek, dark studio shot of the AG1 matte white pouch on a reflective black surface. Minimal green light accents the edges. Typography: 'BETTER FOR YOUR BIOLOGY.' (Top) and 'BETTER FOR YOUR BANK.' (Bottom) in an extra-wide, medium-weight grotesque (Extended Helvetica). The text is justified to the full width of the ad. A small, vibrant green '$3.23' is placed in the center of the frame in a bold, rounded sans font. The aesthetic is ultra-premium and high-tech.

A minimalist composition featuring five large, vibrant green 3D-rendered stars floating above the matte white AG1 pouch. The background is a soft off-white. Typography: '4.8 STARS. 37,000+ REVIEWS.' in a massive, ultra-bold geometric sans-serif (Gilroy) that fills the middle third of the image. The tracking is ultra-tight. A floating 'quote bubble' features a user review in a clean, editorial serif font: 'The only habit I’ve ever been able to stick to.' The vibe is confident and established.

A collage-style layout with black and white portraits of a runner, a CEO, and a parent, with a vibrant green AG1 glass in the center. Typography: 'TRUSTED BY THE BEST' in a bold, uppercase sans-serif with an 'outline-only' effect. The text is layered behind the central glass. Small 'vetted by' logos (NSF, TGA) are arranged in a clean grid at the bottom. The typographic style is high-energy, reminiscent of a Nike or Highsnobiety campaign. Color palette: B&W photos with pops of AG1 green.

A close-up of a glass of green AG1 liquid, with dozens of floating, translucent text snippets of real user reviews layered in the background at different depths. Typography: 'THE PEOPLE HAVE SPOKEN' in a heavy-weight, wide-tracked serif (similar to Recoleta) in the center. The reviews are in a mix of small mono-spaced fonts and handwriting styles, creating a 'wall of proof' effect. The matte white pouch is visible in the lower corner. The aesthetic is busy but curated and modern.

A timeline-inspired layout showing the evolution of the AG1 pouch over the years, ending with the current matte white design. Typography: '10+ YEARS OF FORMULATION' in a sophisticated, ultra-light sans-serif (Helvetica Hairline) at the top. 'V9' (the version number) is placed in a massive, bold green font in the background. Subhead 'Continuous improvement for your health' in a bold, small-caps humanist sans at the bottom. The vibe is heritage-meets-innovation, very clean and clinical.

A grid of logos of famous podcasts and publications (Huberman Lab, Joe Rogan, etc.) in a muted gray, with a vibrant matte white AG1 pouch in the center. Typography: 'AS SEEN ON...' in a bold, condensed grotesque (Impact) that is vertically centered and massive. The logos act as a texture in the background. Below the pouch, 'The most recommended supplement on the planet' is written in a delicate, wide-tracked serif font. The layout is clean, authoritative, and minimalist.

An ASMR-style extreme close-up of green AG1 liquid being poured into a glass, with crisp water droplets and ice. Lighting is bright, airy, and high-key. Typography: 'SURPRISINGLY REFRESHING' in a fluid, organic-style display font (custom serif with soft edges) in AG1 green. The letters are spaced out and follow the curve of the liquid flow. Subhead 'Pineapple, vanilla, and ginger notes' in a tiny, clean sans-serif at the bottom. The visual is incredibly appetizing and clean.

A high-speed photography shot of a scoop of AG1 powder hitting the surface of cold water, creating a vibrant green splash. The matte white pouch is in the background. Typography: 'THE PERFECT MIX' in a bold, italicized grotesque (Europa) that suggests motion. The headline is split: 'THE PERFECT' is at the top left, 'MIX' is at the bottom right. A thin, green line connects them, cutting through the splash. The look is energetic, fresh, and highly commercial.

A minimalist shot of a clear glass of AG1 green liquid sitting on a reflective white surface. No bubbles, just a smooth, uniform color. Typography: 'NO GRIT. ALL GREEN.' in a heavy-weight, all-caps geometric sans (Montserrat) centered. The 'NO GRIT' part is in white with a thin green outline; 'ALL GREEN' is solid green. The text is oversized and acts as the primary visual element. The matte white pouch is only partially visible on the left edge. The vibe is smooth and premium.

Overhead shot of a glass of AG1 being stirred, creating a hypnotic green vortex. The matte white pouch sits next to it. Typography: 'VIBRANT BY NATURE' in an elegant, high-contrast serif font (Didot style) with extra-wide tracking. The headline is placed in a circle around the glass. Subcopy 'Cold-processed to preserve nutrients' is placed in a small, clean mono font at the bottom. The color palette is high-contrast green and white, very fresh and clean.

The matte white AG1 pouch is shown inside a modern, glass-front refrigerator. Condensation drips down the glass, framing the product perfectly. Typography: 'THE MORNING UPGRADE.' in an ultra-bold, square-shaped sans-serif (Eurostile) stacked in the center. A small, vibrant badge in the corner reads '9 SUPPLEMENTS IN 1.' The color of the text is white, popping against the dark green of the background. Lighting is cool-toned and crisp. The aesthetic is high-end editorial, but the message is pure conversion: simplify your routine.

A sleek, black gym bag on a concrete floor with a matte white AG1 travel pack and a metal water bottle sticking out. Lighting is moody and early-morning. Typography: 'STOP CRASHING. START PERFORMING.' in a kinetic, slanted display font that bleeds off the bottom. Subhead: 'Sustained energy without the jitters. Try it risk-free for 90 days.' in a small, light-weight sans-serif. The vibe is gritty and elite, focusing on the immediate benefit of performance over abstract goals.

A modern, high-tech office desk with a glass of vibrant green AG1 prominently in the foreground. A matte white pouch sits slightly out of focus in the background. Typography: 'THE 60-SECOND BRAIN FOG KILLER.' in a sophisticated humanist sans (Gill Sans) with wide tracking, positioned vertically along the right. Subcopy: 'Replace your multivitamin, probiotics, and minerals with one scoop.' in a bold, all-caps mono font at the bottom. The aesthetic is 'quiet luxury' meets peak cognitive performance.

A close-up of a hand holding an AG1 travel pack against a blurred airport terminal backdrop. The green logo on the white pack is the sharp focal point. Typography: 'IMMUNITY INSURANCE AT 30,000 FT.' in a bold, lowercase-only grotesque (Inter). The headline is oversized and layered for depth. A small star-rating graphic with the text 'Trusted by 100+ Olympians' is placed at the top left. The vibe is fast-paced, modern, and highlights the specific benefit of travel-ready protection.

A runner in the distance on a coastal trail at sunrise, with a blurred matte white AG1 bottle in the foreground. Typography: 'RECOVER FASTER. RUN LONGER.' in a tall condensed sans-serif (Tungsten) filling the top half. The text is 50% transparent. Subcopy: 'Build your foundational health. 90-day money-back guarantee.' in a heavy-weight, small-caps sans-serif at the bottom. This marries aspirational lifestyle imagery with a low-friction, high-reward CTA.

A curated flat-lay of 'everyday carry' items in shades of white and black, with the matte white AG1 travel pack and green branding as the only color. Typography: '98% OF PEOPLE DON'T GET ENOUGH MICRONUTRIENTS.' in a massive, ultra-heavy display serif centered in AG1 green. Subhead: 'Fix your deficiencies with one daily habit.' in a small, technical mono font below it. The aesthetic is high-fashion, but the copy uses a pattern-interrupting statistic to stop the scroll.

An abstract 3D visualization of cellular absorption with green particles entering a cell. High-end medical animation style. Typography: 'STOP WASTING MONEY ON PILLS YOU DON'T ABSORB.' in a technical, wide-tracked SF Mono font at the top. The matte white AG1 pouch is in an inset circular window. Data points like 'Bioavailability' and 'Bioactive Form' are scattered in light sans-serif. Color palette: Dark green and charcoal. This positions AG1 as the scientific solution to 'expensive urine.'

A minimalist diagram of a human torso with a vibrant green glow in the gut, next to a fresh glass of AG1 liquid. Typography: 'THE END OF THE MID-DAY BLOAT.' in a bold, high-contrast serif (Gazpacho) centered. The word 'BLOAT' is twice the size of other words. Subhead: '7.2 Billion CFU Probiotics + Digestive Enzymes.' in a clean, light-weight grotesque at the bottom. This targets a specific pain point with a medical-grade, premium aesthetic.

A comparison chart showing 'AG1' vs 'Standard Multivitamins' in terms of absorption rate; the AG1 bar is vibrant green and 3x higher. Typography: 'WHY PILLS ARE OBSOLETE.' in an ultra-bold, condensed sans-serif (Roboto Condensed) at a 45-degree angle in the background. The matte white pouch is the hero image next to the chart. Subcopy: 'Liquid-form nutrition for maximum uptake. Risk-free for 90 days.' The look is data-heavy, authoritative, and focuses on the 'Us vs. Them' logic.

An architectural-style drawing of the AG1 pouch as the 'foundation' of a building. Typography: 'BUILD A BODY THAT LASTS.' in a heavy-weight, wide-tracked geometric sans-serif (Futura) bleeding off the edges at 10% opacity. Secondary headline: 'The only supplement you need. Period.' is placed in a bold, small-caps humanist sans in the center. The palette is strictly AG1 green, cream, and charcoal, communicating structural integrity and long-term health value.
